title: exp2 不用高精度; 代码附近load store pingpong
raw_content:
exp2 不用高精度; 代码附近load store pingpong
基础信息：
基于kernel ： Page_Attn_chunk_decode_ds_KVUMA
平台：br166
验证用例：
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, true, false>(
0, 64, 1024, 1024, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 64, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, true, false>(
0, 128, 1024, 1024, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 64, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, true, false>(
0, 192, 1024, 1024, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 64, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, true, false>(
0, 256, 1024, 1024, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 64, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));
EXPECT_TRUE((testGQA_chunk_prefill_packing_no_align<BF16, mask_mode_causal, UMAMemType, OutMemType_NUMA, UMAMemType, UMAMemType, true, false>(
0, 512, 1024, 1024, max_num_token, window_size, 1, 64, 1, 576, spc_num, die_num, repeat_time, warmup_time)
.pass));


优化代码：
1）update vi使用pingpong
image2025-11-17_17-21-29.png


性能结果：
image2025-11-17_17-27-1.png



结论：该优化点无性能收益
